title: Vegan Italian Pasta Bake
description: A delicious, comforting vegan pasta bake made with wholemeal pasta and a variety of Italian ingredients.
instructions: Cook the wholemeal pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tender Italian tomatoes, nutritional yeast, and flour to the pan. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked pasta to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with vegan parmesan cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve hot.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
